title: NII Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Junior Project Assistant Posts
description: The National Institute of Immunology (NII) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Junior Project Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree or Diploma can apply for the NII Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode.
